name: basic-report
description: A simple linear research report — research, outline, write, review.

steps.instruction:
Research {topic} for an audience of {audience}.
Gather credible, recent sources and capture the key facts and tensions.
steps.title: Research

steps.instruction:
Using {sources}, draft a structured outline for the report:
an intro, 3–5 body sections, and a conclusion.
steps.title: Outline

steps.instruction:
Write the full report from {outline}, citing {sources} inline.
Match the tone to the {audience}.
steps.title: Write

steps.instruction:
Critically review {draft}. Fix weak transitions, unsupported claims,
and anything that reads like filler. Produce the final report.
steps.title: Review
